-  kCTFontFullNameKey 

Global Variable# kCTFontFullNameKey

iOS 3.2+iPadOS 3.2+Mac Catalyst 13.1+macOS 10.5+tvOS 9.0+visionOS 1.0+watchOS 2.0+

```
let kCTFontFullNameKey: CFString
```

## [Discussion](/documentation/coretext/kctfontfullnamekey#Discussion)

The name specifier for the full name.
